arts.ttl: Gianfranco Zola names Manchester United target as the new version of himself

Tuttomercatoweb have an interview with the former Chelsea star today in which he discusses Italian football and who he sees as closest to playing like him. arts.ttl: Top Amorim target CHOOSES Man Utd transfer over Premier League rivals
arts.sum: Champions League hopefuls Nottingham Forest are also pushing hard to sign Cunha, however United believe they have the upper hand in negotiations due to the Brazilian’s desire to play for a ‘traditional top six club’ even if Amorim’s side aren’t playing European football next season. Manchester United have been given a major boost in the race to sign one of the most in-demand transfer targets in the Premier League this summer.
